commit.message:
Rebase and address review feedback

- Fix spacing/indentation
- Introduce is_vector_const_initializer helper
- Extend tests
- Adjust the generator following `is_vector` removal

8381149: C2: postaloc: deduplicate vector constants

Some vector operations do not have inputs and essentially initialize
vectors with a constant value. These operations can be marked for
spilling and subsequently rematerialized at every use. The result of
the transformation might look as follows:
   movi    v16.2d, #0x0
   str     q16, [x16, #64]
   movi    v16.2d, #0x0
   str     q16, [x16, #32]
   movi    v16.2d, #0x0
   str     q16, [x16, #16]
   movi    v16.2d, #0x0
   str     q16, [x16]
   movi    v16.2d, #0x0
   str     q16, [x16, #48]
   movi    v16.2d, #0x0
   str     q16, [x16, #112]
   movi    v16.2d, #0x0
   str     q16, [x16, #80]
   movi    v16.2d, #0x0
   str     q16, [x16, #96]

Introduce deduplication of these rematerialized vector
constant initializations reducing the above sequence to:
   movi    v16.2d, #0x0
   str     q16, [x16, #64]
   str     q16, [x16, #32]
   str     q16, [x16, #16]
   str     q16, [x16]
   str     q16, [x16, #48]
   str     q16, [x16, #112]
   str     q16, [x16, #80]
   str     q16, [x16, #96]
